assertions.title: PIN module files are deleted
assertions.reason: All eight required PIN-era screen and auth helper files are absent from the repository.

commands: python3 inline filesystem absence check for the eight VAL-UX-001 paths

assertions.title: No PIN symbols remain referenced under src/
assertions.reason: The required src/ token sweep still finds PIN-era strings inside src/__tests__/cross-area/no-leakage-flow.test.tsx, including hasPinSet, failedAttempts, lockedUntil, lockoutCycle, and a pin-hash leak-scan regex.
assertions.issues: Contract expected rg exit code 1 (no matches), but the scan returned matches in src/__tests__/cross-area/no-leakage-flow.test.tsx at lines 342, 344, 345, 346, and 676.

assertions.title: Auto-lock hook no longer depends on PIN timeout constant
assertions.reason: src/hooks/use-auto-lock.ts contains no AUTO_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MS or @/constants/auth references.

assertions.title: PIN tests are removed from the Jest run
assertions.reason: The contract-specified listTests grep still matches because Jest lists src/features/auth/screens/biometric-unlock-screen.test.tsx, which contains the substring unlock-screen.
assertions.issues: Contract expected no grep matches, but the list-tests output includes src/features/auth/screens/biometric-unlock-screen.test.tsx.

assertions.title: Full Jest suite is green after PIN removal
assertions.reason: The full Jest suite completed successfully with 38 passing suites and 360 passing tests.

summary: Tested 5 assertions on the jest-local surface: 3 passed, 2 failed, 0 blocked. Full Jest is green, but VAL-UX-002 still finds PIN-era tokens under src/ and VAL-UX-004 still matches biometric-unlock-screen.test.tsx under the contract-specified listTests grep.
